subject: Clean up validators - keep only dataset-dir rules
description: Add missing validation rules: pattern_id requires op_filter, pattern_id conflicts with shape_source, shape_source requires pattern_source, shape_source requires op_filter, pattern_source requires shape_source or pattern_id, dataset_dir conflicts with augment, dataset_dir conflicts with shape_source, dataset_dir requires pipeline phase, augment requires op_filter matmul, metadata not required with shape_source/pattern_id, at least one action (including phase flags)
